## Author Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and avoids unrelated refactors.
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior, or the verification section explains why none are needed.
- [ ] Documentation and task artifacts are updated where the contract changed.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, and fixtures contain no credentials or private data.
